view.title: Duba Sabar {id}
view.nextInvoiceDate: Ranar Takardar Biyan Kuɗi Mai Zuwa:
view.emailSentMessage: An sake aika imel na maraba. Duba akwatin imel ɗinka.
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Ka tabbata kana son sake aika imel na maraba?

order.title: Oda Sabar
order.iAgreeToTerms: Na karanta sharuɗɗan da ke sama kuma na yarda.
order.hostnameHelp: Yi amfani da sunan host don gano uwar garken. Domed ba ya buƙatar zama ingantacce ko rajista. Ana buƙatar daya lokaci a cikin sunan host. Sauran misalai: database.local, web.server ko your.name.
order.passwordRequirement: Lura: Kalmar sirri dole ta ƙunshi aƙalla haruffa 8, harafi ɗaya na ƙananan haruffa, harafi ɗaya na manyan haruffa, lamba ɗaya, harafi na musamman.
order.contactSales: Da fatan za a tuntubi sashen siyarwa.
order.autoRenewNotice: Za a sabunta biyan kuɗi ta atomatik bayan kowane wata a {cost} har sai an soke.
order.tosAcknowledgement: Ta hanyar tabbatar da wannan akwati, ka amince cewa kana sayan samfurin biyan kuɗi wanda ke sabuntawa ta atomatik (Bisa ga Sharuɗɗan da aka jera a sama) kuma ana caji daga katin kiredit da ka bayar yau. Idan kana son soke sabuntawar ta atomatik, za ka iya shiga tashar abokin ciniki, zaɓi sabis mai aiki kuma ka danna haɗin Soke ko aika imel a: billing{'@'}interserver.net. Ta hanyar tabbatar da akwati kuma ka danna Oda a nan, ka kuma amince da cewa ka karanta, ka fahimta, kuma ka yarda da Sharuɗɗanmu da Manufar Keɓancewa.

reverseDns.title: Saitun DNS Mai Juyawa
reverseDns.changeWarning: Canje-canjen DNS mai juyawa na ɗaukar har awa ɗaya don bayyana.

ipmiLive.title: IP na IPMI
ipmiLive.description: Ba da IP mai rai ga mai sarrafa IPMI yana iyakance ga IP ɗinka kuma yana iyakance ga amfani na sa'o'i 24.
